message:
fix(tls): Fix TLS 1.3 handshake and add HTTP version control

- Fix receiveServerHandshake() to parse multiple handshake messages from
  a single TLS record (servers like Google send EncryptedExtensions,
  Certificate, CertificateVerify, Finished all in one record)
- Add 32-byte random session_id for middlebox compatibility
- Reorder ClientHello extensions (SNI first) per RFC conventions
- Increase ClientHello buffer from 512 to 600 bytes

Add HttpVersion enum with .auto/.http1/.http2 options:
- .auto: HTTP/1.1 for http://, HTTP/2 for https:// (default)
- .http1: Force HTTP/1.1 even for HTTPS
- .http2: Force HTTP/2

Add initWithVersion() constructor and requestHttp1Tls() for HTTP/1.1
over TLS (useful for benchmarking HTTP/1.1 vs HTTP/2).
